title: Build the content schema validator and Def compiler spike
summary: Validate JSON5 source content, namespace IDs, references, patch ordering and localization keys, then compile a small immutable runtime catalog.
acceptance: Invalid IDs, duplicate IDs, missing references and localization keys fail with source locations
Sample anomaly and incident content compile without custom runtime code
Patch conflicts are reported rather than silently accepted

history.details: Added structured content validation and compiler spike; required checks pass.

changes_requested: High: patch-applied references/localization are not revalidated and can compile missing refs or throw TypeError; Medium: invalid/unknown patch changes and JSON5 files are silently accepted or ignored.

Fixed reviewer-requested regressions in WM-0009: patch application now revalidates references/localization after cloning and patching, patch field shape/type issues now emit structured diagnostics with source locations, and JSON5 fixture sources are parsed or explicitly rejected instead of being silently ignored. Re-ran content validation, content tests, compile smoke, typecheck, lint, format, boundaries, and diff checks.

changes_requested: Medium: JSON5 sources are parsed, but diagnostics for unquoted JSON5 keys fall back to 1:1 instead of the offending id/reference/localization/patch field, so source-location acceptance is still incomplete for JSON5 fixtures.

Fixed the remaining JSON5 source-location gap for unquoted keys. Property lookup now recognizes bare JSON5 keys so missing reference and localization diagnostics stay anchored to the offending patch fields instead of falling back to 1:1. Added a targeted JSON5 patch-location regression test and re-ran content tests, content validation, core-smoke compile, typecheck, lint, format, boundaries, and diff checks.

changes_requested: Medium: JSON5 bare-key source lookup now avoids 1:1, but it also matches keys inside JSON5 comments; missing_def_reference/missing_localization_key diagnostics can point at comment lines instead of the offending patch fields, so JSON5 source-location acceptance is still incomplete.

Fixed JSON5 source-location lookup to be comment-aware. Bare-key diagnostics now skip // and /* */ comment regions, so missing_def_reference and missing_localization_key stay anchored to the real patch fields rather than comment lines. Added a regression test covering comments that mention labelKey/references before the actual JSON5 fields, and re-ran content tests, content validation, core-smoke compile, typecheck, lint, format, boundaries, and diff checks.

changes_requested: High: comment-aware JSON5 lookup skips quoted keys before matching them, so normal JSON diagnostics for invalid IDs and missing references regress to 1:1 instead of the offending id/reference fields; source-location acceptance remains broken despite required checks passing.

Fixed source-location regression by restoring quoted-key lookup for plain JSON while keeping JSON5 bare-key lookup comment-aware. Plain JSON invalid IDs and missing references now resolve to the offending quoted field/value instead of 1:1, and JSON5 bare keys still skip // and /* */ comments. Added regression coverage for quoted JSON source locations and comment-aware JSON5 bare-key source locations, then re-ran content tests, content validation, core-smoke compile, typecheck, lint, format, boundaries, and diff checks.
verified: No blocking findings; quoted JSON source locations and comment-aware JSON5 bare-key locations verified, required content checks and engineering gates pass.
Verified branch 0b2006a; source-located content validation and compiler spike reviewed; preparing main merge.

review.summary: No blocking findings; quoted JSON source locations and comment-aware JSON5 bare-key locations verified, required content checks and engineering gates pass.

integration.summary: Verified branch 0b2006a; source-located content validation and compiler spike reviewed; preparing main merge.
